caption:
On the 7th Sept 2019, marked a date of our very first special archery friendly match! ✨

MMU Cyber x MMU Melaka

Congrats to those who participated, till we meet again with the same smile and bigger strength fellas 🤜🏼🤛 Thank you to every single of you, we tied em knots.

#KingCobraClan #MMUCyber #MMUMelaka #Archery

before we hit the road of 2020, our achery's team went for their last bow at UMP - Excella International Indoor Championship! congrats to the representative, may this passionate spirit share among the #kingcobraclan #mmuarchery #mmuathletes #mmucyberjaya #mmumelaka

On the 15 February we face some new challenges over at MMU Melaka. Archery Intervarsity 2020 Competition. Congratulations to the medallist and winners! 🎉

#archeryintervarsity2020 #ai20 #mmucyberjaya #mmumelaka #mmuarchery #kingkobraclan

Practice makes perfect✨

King Cobra’s archer is getting ready for the UMP Indoor Archery Championships! 💪🏼 Good Luck archers! May the best aimer wins!🎉 #mmucyberjaya #mmuarcheryclub #mmuarchery #indoorarchery #bullseye #kingcobraclan 🐍
anddddd here are the faces of the #KingCobraClan 🏹 hold it, don't fire! 🔥
A little demonstration in front of out stall! Even E-bee is joining us!! #mmuarchery #mmucyberjaya #baguettepizza #bow #recurve #kingcobraclan #ebee

To be a legend, one must learn from the experienced. Introducing, our coach, Coach Ramesh! 
#kingcobraclan #mmuarchery #mmuathletes #mmucyberjaya
Welcome to the MMU Archery Club. It is fun, challenging, calming and satisfying when you get your first bullseye! What are you waiting for? Put your name in the registration form!

On the 7th Sept 2019, marked a date of our very first special archery friendly match! ✨

MMU Cyber x MMU Melaka

Congrats to those who participated, till we meet again with the same smile and bigger strength fellas 🤜🏼🤛 Thank you to every single of you, we tied em knots.

#KingCobraClan #MMUCyber #MMUMelaka #Archery

Never have I ever tried a Baguette Pizza? What?!? You have never tried a Baguette Pizza?!? Well you’re in luck because we be selling those at the *MMU Bazaar Week!* From 14 Jan to 16 Jan, Lecture Hall, stall 15. Share us around! Tell a friend and see you there!
#mmubazaarweek #mmubazaar2020 #fundraiser #mmucyberjaya #mmuarcheryclub #kingcobraclan
Annual Grand Meeting went rad for the #KingCobraClan 🏹 we'll keep ya up to date with the archers' upcoming routine, hold your arrows team!
Right before the meeting, our hi-com had a discussion ft just a little taste of coffee to gear up the engine ☕ #KingCobraClan

📸 @naim_ace321

To another new semester means more family members!

Impressive energy from the #kingcobraclan. Slowly but surely, till one day we hit the highest target 🙏 see you guys again at the field!
